description_long: This house consists of two distinct, modern structures side by side, each with flat roofs and large windows. The left building features a tan wooden facade, a prominent garage with a white van parked outside, and a paved driveway leading to the entrance. The right building is taller, with a gray and white exterior, multiple balconies, and a rooftop terrace adorned with greenery. Both structures are surrounded by minimal landscaping, including a few trees and shrubs, and are set on a paved lot. The windows are large and arranged in horizontal bands, providing ample natural light to the interiors. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern dual-structure house with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of tan wood and gray facades, featuring balconies, a garage, and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tan wooden building with a garage, driveway, white van, and the taller gray building with balconies and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the gray building, rooftop terrace, and the rear of the tan building with visible outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facades of both buildings, rooftop terrace, and the arrangement of windows and balconies.
description_view_3: Opposite front view focusing on the main entrance of the tan building, the driveway, and the side profile of the gray building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal bands and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a recessed door under a small overhang, with a paved approach and adjacent garage entrance.
